MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Gary Louie; Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/JIRoque; Not Reported. (Dept. 218)

Appearances:
Attorney, IVY P. TSENG, representing and appearing on behalf of the plaintiff.

Defendant, DALE WALTON, is present.
Attorney, EVGENIA N. FKIARAS, representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference.
The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

This case settled, the trial date of OCT-19-2009 is vacated.
